testcase.name: test_store_purchase_marks_shopping_item_as_purchased

failure.message: AssertionError: Item should be marked as purchased after store purchase assert False == True + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffa61a253640>('purchased') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffa61a253640> = {'chore_id': 'chore_eb7fdca27529', 'chore_title': 'TEST_Auto Mark Purchase Test', 'item_id': 'item_2d7c7783cf53', 'item_name': 'Carrots', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_shopping_chore_enhancement.py:478: in test_store_purchase_marks_shopping_item_as_purchased assert found_after.get("purchased") == True, "Item should be marked as purchased after store purchase" E AssertionError: Item should be marked as purchased after store purchase E assert False == True E + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffa61a253640>('purchased') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffa61a253640> = {'chore_id': 'chore_eb7fdca27529', 'chore_title': 'TEST_Auto Mark Purchase Test', 'item_id': 'item_2d7c7783cf53', 'item_name': 'Carrots', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_mark_purchased_endpoint_works

failure.message: AssertionError: Item should be marked as purchased assert False == True + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffa619f57800>('purchased') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffa619f57800> = {'chore_id': 'chore_cfee12ef193e', 'chore_title': 'TEST_Mark Purchased Endpoint Test', 'item_id': 'item_2d7c7783cf53', 'item_name': 'Carrots', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_shopping_chore_enhancement.py:572: in test_mark_purchased_endpoint_works assert found_item.get("purchased") == True, "Item should be marked as purchased" E AssertionError: Item should be marked as purchased E assert False == True E + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffa619f57800>('purchased') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffa619f57800> = {'chore_id': 'chore_cfee12ef193e', 'chore_title': 'TEST_Mark Purchased Endpoint Test', 'item_id': 'item_2d7c7783cf53', 'item_name': 'Carrots', ...}.get
